reforms.description: The government has set up an Innovation Council to improve coordination between policies and actors, focusing on creating jobs and fostering sustainable growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing coordination and addressing obstacles to innovation, the Council aims to improve the efficiency of public support and stimulate economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The Innovation Council has been established and is actively working on its agenda.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Innovation Council is a significant step towards improving the governance of innovation policy in Sweden, although it is part of a broader reform effort.
reforms.source_quote: The government has set up an Innovation Council to focus on creating jobs and fostering sustainable growth.

reforms.description: Sweden's government is preparing a research and innovation policy bill every four years, which aims to improve coordination among various innovation actors and enhance medium-term planning.
reforms.package_name: Swedish Research and Innovation Policy Bill
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improved coordination and planning can lead to more effective allocation of resources and enhanced innovation outcomes.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is preparing a research and innovation policy bill.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in how Sweden approaches research and innovation policy, aiming for better coordination and effectiveness across multiple agencies.
reforms.source_quote: Research and innovation policy bills prepared every four years in broad consultation between the government and other innovation actors also improve coordination of policies and medium-term planning.

reforms.description: The Swedish Governmental Agency for Innovation Systems (VINNOVA) has limited funding compared to its Austrian and Finnish counterparts, which affects its ability to support innovation effectively.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Limited funding restricts the agency's capacity to support innovation initiatives, potentially stifling growth and competitiveness.
reforms.status_evidence: VINNOVA has limited funding relative to foreign agencies with similar missions.
reforms.importance_rationale: While not a major reform, addressing the funding limitations of VINNOVA is significant for enhancing Sweden's innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: Even VINNOVA, the Swedish Governmental Agency for Innovation Systems, has limited funding relative to foreign agencies with similar missions.

reforms.description: The Swedish government has established an Innovation Council aimed at identifying obstacles to innovation and improving coordination between various policies and actors involved in the innovation ecosystem.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing coordination in innovation policies can lead to more effective resource allocation and stimulate innovation, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has recently set up an Innovation Council.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Innovation Council represents a significant step towards better coordination of innovation policies, which is crucial for addressing the challenges faced by the innovation ecosystem.
reforms.source_quote: The government has recently set up an Innovation Council to identify obstacles to innovation and improve coordination between policies and actors.

reforms.description: Sweden's policies to support growth emphasize the importance of innovation and a supportive framework for competitiveness, highlighting the need for sustained investment in skills and intangible capital.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in skills and intangible capital is crucial for maintaining competitiveness and fostering innovation, which can lead to higher productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The policies emphasize the need for innovation and supportive framework conditions for growth.
reforms.importance_rationale: The emphasis on innovation and skills investment represents a significant policy direction aimed at enhancing Sweden's competitiveness in the global economy.
reforms.source_quote: Sustained investments in skills would boost future competitiveness and growth.

reforms.description: Sweden has introduced an R&D tax incentive scheme targeted mainly at SMEs to support private R&D and innovation, marking a significant shift in its innovation policy framework.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The tax incentives are expected to stimulate private sector investment in R&D, leading to increased innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme has been introduced and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a structural change in Sweden's approach to supporting R&D in the private sector, which is crucial for enhancing innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: Sweden has recently introduced an R&D tax incentive scheme targeted mainly on SMEs.

reforms.description: The government has allocated resources to VINNOVA to enhance innovative public procurement, aiming to foster innovation through strategic purchasing in various sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By using public procurement to stimulate demand for innovative products, the initiative is expected to drive innovation and improve public services.
reforms.status_evidence: The government decided to allocate resources to VINNOVA for this purpose.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative enhances the existing framework for public procurement, promoting innovation in key sectors.
reforms.source_quote: The government decided to allocate resources to VINNOVA for this purpose.

reforms.description: Sweden aims to broaden support for innovation and enhance the coordination of innovation and research policies, which includes lowering financing constraints by fostering the development of debt and equity instruments and platforms for corporate finance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to finance and supporting innovation, the reform is expected to enhance productivity and stimulate economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The recommendation to broaden support for innovation was made in the context of strengthening the foundations for growth.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing the overall innovation ecosystem in Sweden, which is crucial for maintaining competitiveness and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Continue to broaden support for innovation and enhance co-ordination of innovation and research policies.
